title: Republic Act No. 6951
text:
REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES

CONGRESS OF THE PHILIPPINES

H. No. 5242

Third Regular Session

REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6951

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARETBET BRIDGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAGABAG, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA, TO SAN LORENZO RUIZ MEMORIAL BRIDGE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Baretbet Bridge in the Municipality of Bagabag, Province of Nueva Vizcaya, is hereby changed to San Lorenzo Ruiz Memorial Bridge.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, May 8, 1990.

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
